name: stateweave
description: Cross-framework cognitive state portability for AI agents. Export from LangGraph, DSPy, LlamaIndex, OpenAI Agents SDK, Haystack, Letta/MemGPT, Semantic Kernel, MCP, CrewAI, or AutoGen. Zero knowledge lost.

tools.name: export_agent_state
tools.description: Export cognitive state from any supported framework (LangGraph, MCP, CrewAI, AutoGen, DSPy, LlamaIndex, OpenAI Agents SDK, Haystack, Letta, Semantic Kernel) into the Universal Schema format. Captures conversation history, working memory, goals, tool results, long-term memory, and episodic memory.

tools.name: import_agent_state
tools.description: Import a StateWeavePayload into a target framework with full validation. Non-portable elements are flagged with severity, reason, and remediation.

tools.name: diff_agent_states
tools.description: Compare two agent state snapshots and return a detailed change report showing additions, removals, and modifications across all cognitive state fields.

tools.name: detect_framework
tools.description: Auto-detect the source framework from a state blob. Analyzes keys and structure patterns to identify which framework produced the state with confidence scoring.

tools.name: validate_state
tools.description: Validate a StateWeave payload for schema compliance, field completeness, and importability.

tools.name: generate_migration_report
tools.description: Generate a shareable migration report (HTML, Markdown, or JSON) with fidelity scoring, warnings table, and audit trail.

resources.name: Migration History
resources.description: Log of all migration operations with timestamps and audit trails

resources.name: Agent State Snapshot
resources.description: Live cognitive state for a specific agent
